summary: Entry point for shipyard-cp AI orchestration control plane. Defines architecture with LiteLLM as inference gateway, worker adapters for Codex/Claude Code/Antigravity, and OSS connectors. Documents setup, API endpoints, implementation status (P0/P1/P2 complete), and module structure.
risks: [P2-Medium] Load testing not performed - performance unknown
tests: GitHub Projects v2 live tests verified

refactoring_candidates.solution: Move to BaseWorkerAdapter as protected methods
